description: Style Note Formal dressing only gets better with these slip-on brown leather shoes from red tape. The tapered toe box and cutting edge look complement all semi-formal and formal wear. The design creates a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence. Product Details Brown slip-on with tapered toe with a long tongue A padded tongue and inner TPU outsole with an upraised heel Material and Care Leather Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
